data.settleTest: The DDA 2026 State of the Dutch Data Centers colocation-additions-by-year figure — i.e., NL's share of CE-7 NEW colo capacity commissioned during Year-1 — which only exists after the year unfolds; the current 0.28 is correctly derived from a 2025 installed-capacity snapshot, so the dispute is about future flow, not today's stock.

researchQueries.query: DDA State of the Dutch Data Centers 2026 — annual NL colocation net additions (MW) vs CE-7 total additions for the commissioning year

Does the Dutch hyperscale ban (Jan 2024 decree) exempt colocation and enterprise data centres, and has NL colo pipeline continued adding capacity in Amsterdam MRA municipalities and Zeewolde/Hollands Kroon since 2024?
